metadata.intent: One producer on homogeneous substrate. Exercises photosynthesis, metabolic cost, asexual reproduction, offspring dispersal, and patch formation around a single founder.
metadata.probes: frozen dynamics / extinction — can a lone founder persist and seed a patch?
metadata.viability_prediction: undecided — max_ticks is 0, so this never steps; it is a load/seed smoke test, not a dynamics probe.
metadata.expected_outcome: Loads and seeds one structurally-provisioned producer without panic.
metadata.observed: 2026-05-31, seed 1: seed-only (max_ticks=0), never steps. OK as a load smoke test.
metadata.status: stale-params — growth_efficiency unset, defaults to 0.0 (no structure would be built if it stepped).
